_doc: Golden set for LLM-as-judge sense accuracy (Day-4). Each item: the term, the sentence it appears in, and the WordNet sense_id a human considers correct in that context. ~15 words. expected_sense is a reference; the judge scores whether the model's choice fits the SENTENCE (0-5), not just exact-id match.

items.sentence: We must reduce carbon gas emissions.
He sat on the river bank watching the water.
items.note: sloping land beside water, not finance

items.sentence: She deposited her salary at the bank.
The mattress spring broke last night.
This bag is very light to carry.
I run five kilometres every morning.
She runs a small bakery downtown.
The referee made a fair decision.
I read a fascinating novel last week.
They proposed a novel approach to the problem.
The river current is very strong here.
He gave a moving address to the graduates.
The doctor examined the patient carefully.
